tasks.label: CDS: Smoke Test
tasks.command: export $(cat .env | grep -v '^#' | xargs) && k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_USERNAME=$TEST_USERNAME -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD -e TEST_DOMAIN=$TEST_DOMAIN apps/cds/scripts/smoke.js

tasks.label: CDS: Normal Load (Production Replay)
tasks.command: export $(cat .env | grep -v '^#' | xargs) && k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_USERNAME=$TEST_USERNAME -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD -e TEST_DOMAIN=$TEST_DOMAIN apps/cds/scripts/normal-load.js

tasks.label: CDS: Peak Load (3x)
tasks.command: export $(cat .env | grep -v '^#' | xargs) && k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_USERNAME=$TEST_USERNAME -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD -e TEST_DOMAIN=$TEST_DOMAIN apps/cds/scripts/peak-load.js

tasks.label: CDS: Stress Test
tasks.command: export $(cat .env | grep -v '^#' | xargs) && k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_USERNAME=$TEST_USERNAME -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD -e TEST_DOMAIN=$TEST_DOMAIN apps/cds/scripts/stress-test.js
